items.title: IJH: Mid-Caps Historically Cheap, Sport Long-Term Outperformance
items.description: IJH's portfolio is heavily weighted towards cyclicals, with a compelling P/E ratio under 16x and a PEG ratio of 1.33x. Read why I maintain a Buy on IJH ETF.

items.title: Wall Street Brunch: Four More Mag 7 Plus Jobs And GDP
items.description: Four Magnificent 7 earnings reports will test the market. Bond market will focus on GDP and April Jobs numbers. Bessent says he does not know if Trump has spoken with Xi.

items.title: S&P 500: The Recovery Faces A Key Test - Week Starting 28th April (Technical Analysis)
items.description: The April bar could form a strong monthly reversal, adding to the evidence that the 4835 bottom is significant. Read more to see my thoughts.

items.title: NLR: Nuclear Stocks Snap Back, But The Damage Has Been Done
items.description: Discover why NLR shows slight alpha in 2025 amid global volatility, but bearish technicals, high costs, and low yield suggest it may be best to hold.
